persona_prompt:
You are filtering Boston events for date ideas — things two people would enjoy doing together.

Great date events:
- Food & drink: wine tastings, prix fixe dinners, cocktail classes, food festivals, tasting menus, new restaurant openings
- Arts & culture: gallery openings, museum exhibits, live music, jazz, comedy shows, theater, film screenings
- Experiences: cooking classes, pottery, dance lessons, sunset cruises, rooftop events, seasonal markets
- Outdoor: scenic walks, garden events, waterfront activities, bike tours
- Nightlife: speakeasy events, live DJ sets, themed parties, rooftop bars

Lower priority:
- Kids/family-focused events
- Pure networking or professional events
- Large-scale sports (unless it's a unique experience like courtside)
- Conferences, lectures, or panels with no social component

Score 0-10. Only return events with score >= 5.

events.description:
⛵ Get Ready for the Ultimate Day on the Water! ⛵

We are gearing up for a legendary weekend of salt air, epic views, and making new connections! If you’ve been looking for a stress-free way to dip your toes into the world of sailing and meet awesome new people, this is it. We’re making "learning the ropes" a total breeze! 🌬️✨

**🌊 What’s on the Horizon?**
Whether you’re a seasoned sailor or have never stepped foot on a boat, we’ve got you covered. Hop aboard a **Rhodes 19 keelboat** for a **free
events.reason: Sailing experience on the water is a scenic, memorable date activity

events.name: Japan Festival! (Boston Commons)
events.description:
The Japan Festival Boston will once again be organized by the historic Boston Common on Saturday, April 25th, to Sunday, April 26th.
**This meetup is host-less, so use the comment section to find each other.** There will be performers, food vendors, cultural events, and more!

Japan’s traditional festival is a place to thank gods for their blessings and gather on special occasions with friends and family, serving as a catalyst for bonding communities. We would like to create our version of this
events.reason: Japan Festival offers food, culture, and outdoor activities — great date experience

events.name: Boards & Bonds: A Casual Evening of Board Games and D&D
events.description:
Come hang out with *Random Acts of Connection* for a chill evening of board games, D&D, and meeting cool new people at the CanalSide Food Hall in CambridgeSide. Whether you’re a tabletop pro or just curious to try something new, this is a fun, low-pressure way to connect, play, and maybe go on a wild quest or two. No experience needed—just bring yourself!

Dungeon Master Dan is guiding six souls on a one-shot Dungeon & Dragons campaign, Newbies welcome. Spots will be first-come based.

\*\*\*\*\
events.reason: Board games and D&D in a casual setting is a fun, interactive date experience

events.name: Boulet Brothers' Dragula: Titans 2 Tour
events.description: Door Time: 7:00pm Show Time: 8:00pm All Ages *All support acts are subject to change without notice.* Bags must not exceed a maximum size of 12" x6" x12". All bags, regardless of size, are subject to search by security. Lighters are not allowed in the venue and there is absolutely NO SMOKING OR VAPING allowed per the city of Boston Ordinances. Any smoking or vaping will result in IMMEDIATE EJECTION from the event. Any medication must be accompanied with proof of prescription. This list of prohibited items is subject to change at the discretion of venue management.
events.reason: Dragula: Titans tour; entertaining drag performance show; all-ages and fun date experience

events.name: Michael McIntyre: Hello America!
events.description: Prices are subject to change at any time without notice. Restrictions and safety protocols may vary by performance. Be sure to visit this show's event details page immediately prior to each performance and to carefully read our pre-performance emails for important information pertaining to your performance. Certain artists and performances may still require masks and/or proof of vaccination for entry. You may purchase tickets (free of service charges) in person at the Boch Center box office, located at 270 Tremont Street in Boston. The box office is open for advance sales Tuesday thru Saturday from 12-6pm and on the day of a show at least 2 hours prior and until at least one half-hour after the advertised show time. Some special offers, such as Platinum tickets, may not be available in person at the box office. All sales are final.
events.reason: Comedy show at established venue, great date activity for laughs

If you experience difficulty climbing stairs and wish to purchase seats in the Mezzanine or Balcony, please plan accordingly and arrive early to allow extra time to get to your seat. Restrictions and safety protocols vary by performance. Be sure to visit this show's event details page immediately prior to each performance and to carefully read our pre-performance emails for important information pertaining to your performance. Purchase tickets (free of service charges) in person at the Boch Center box office, open for advance sales Tue-Sat from 12-6pm and on the day of show at least 2 hours prior to at least one half-hour after the advertised show time. Some special offers, such as Platinum tickets, may not be available in person.

events.name: Galantis ( 21+ )
events.description: This is a 21+ Event with valid form of identification. For US citizens, a valid DMV-issued photo ID or USA passport is required. For international guests, a valid passport is required. Doors 930pm All items brought onto the property are subject to inspection. Lighters, Cigarettes & Vapes are prohibited in the venue, there is NO SMOKING OR VAPING allowed at the venue per the city of Boston Ordinances. All bags larger than 10 in x 9 in, backpacks, professional cameras (i.e detachable lenses), video equipment, luggage, & like articles are strictly prohibited. Any medication must be accompanied with proof of prescription. Guests are prohibited from bringing weapons. Weapons include, but are not limited to, the following: firearms, explosives, stun guns, handcuffs, brass knuckles, sticks, clubs, batons, & knives. Patrons with prohibited articles will be turned away at the entrances and no storage or check area will be provided. Violation of the above will result in EJECTION.
